supply_metrics.notes: Fixed cap; no new minting. Tokens burned weekly on underperforming stakes.

weekly_active_stakers.description: Number of staked models incorporated into meta model weekly
weekly_active_stakers.source: tournament-derived metric, not raw wallet count

active_staking_participants.notes: Only subset of 30k participants actually stake; majority submit without stakes

staking_mechanics.burn_condition: Failure to beat benchmark; underperforming models

aum_growth.reference_point: Assets under management via Numerai hedge fund
aum_growth.note: Indicates growing platform credibility and adoption

holder_concentration.distribution_history: 1M NMR distributed to 12,000 active platform users at launch
holder_concentration.current_distribution: Highly concentrated; most tokens held by Numerai treasury or early staker cohorts
holder_concentration.liquidity_concern: Low velocity; most NMR locked in staking or cold wallets

deflationary_mechanics.burn_rate: Variable; depends on participant model performance
deflationary_mechanics.cumulative_effect: Supply reduction over time; creates scarcity pressure

exchange_flows.observation: Most NMR stays in staking or cold storage; minimal exchange in/out flows
exchange_flows.trading_pattern: Thin markets; subject to sharp price corrections
exchange_flows.institutional_interest: Growing (recent funding rounds indicate VC interest)

retention_metrics.retention_signal: Whether stakers re-stake (compound) after wins or withdraw
retention_metrics.data_gap: Specific re-staking rates not publicly available
retention_metrics.observation: Rising total staked amount suggests retention improving, but granular cohort data unavailable

research_period.coverage: Tournament metrics, supply, staking, deflationary mechanics

data_quality_notes.sources: Numerai blog, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, official tournament docs, search results
gaps: Real-time staker count by round (must query Numerai API or dashboard directly)
Granular burn statistics (weekly token destruction amounts)
Exchange orderbook depth and trading volume by venue
Staker cohort retention rates and re-staking percentages
data_quality_notes.limitation: Free source research; Numerai does not publish detailed on-chain analytics publicly. Dashboard at truth.numer.ai has live metrics but not API-accessible.

activity_characterization.primary_signal: Weekly staking participation in tournament rounds
activity_characterization.signal_strength: Strong; directly tied to platform viability
activity_characterization.velocity_note: Very low exchange velocity; capital efficiency through locked staking
activity_characterization.summary: NMR on-chain activity is fundamentally tournament-based: data scientists stake NMR weekly on prediction model performance. On-chain signal = staking volume + weekly active staker count. This is NOT exchange-driven (low velocity) and NOT DeFi-yield farming. Numerai treasury concentration (27%+ of supply) is a structural risk factor. Activity quality depends on staker retention and compounding behavior, which are difficult to measure without API access.
